title: Ultra-Realistic Cinematic Portrait
sourceTitle: Autumn Park Vintage Bicycle Victorian Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of beautiful young adult woman riding vintage black bicycle through autumn park filled with brilliant golden-yellow ginkgo trees and softly falling leaves. Subject: beautiful young adult woman wears elegant dark brown Victorian-style dress with lace trim, high ruffle collar, black bow tie, and matching wide-brimmed vintage hat, with long dark hair caught in a gentle breeze and a graceful cinematic riding posture. Scene: autumn park filled with brilliant golden-yellow ginkgo trees and softly falling leaves surrounds the rider with golden-yellow ginkgo trees, softly falling autumn leaves, warm sun-drenched atmosphere, and shallow depth park background. Composition: 85mm DSLR portrait with the bicycle and rider moving through the frame, elegant fashion details visible, hair flowing behind, warm background bokeh, and balanced cinematic subject placement. Signature Elements: Preserved autumn park vintage bicycle victorian fashion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic fashion portrait, Victorian-inspired styling, DSLR quality, highly detailed textures, shallow depth of field, masterpiece autumn editorial finish. Color Palette: Golden-yellow ginkgo leaves, dark brown Victorian dress, black bicycle and bow details, warm sunlight, natural skin tones, and soft autumn park neutrals. Lighting: Soft natural golden-hour lighting, warm sun-drenched glow, gentle hair rim light, shallow-depth background separation, and detailed textile highlights. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
